summary: This document is a user manual for the KeepMeCompany AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform, outlining system features and operational procedures for medical centre staff. It details implementation steps, staff training requirements, and security protocols including GDPR compliance and data protection measures. The manual also covers troubleshooting, maintenance schedules, and support contact information.
